session_context.active_objective: Production hardening for KU BAZAR C2C marketplace

technical_findings: Trendyol mobile web uses manifest + service worker + Workbox + push worker integration.
This repository currently has no first-class PWA implementation.
Current proxy matcher may need exclusions for service worker and manifest routes during PWA rollout.

Candidate E improves homepage/sell paint: brand logo now uses optimized Next/Image asset, category icons use optimized WebP assets, homepage category/filter shell streams separately from product grid, and /sell receives server-provided categories with client fallback only.

Candidate E deployed to production as commit 42e436f / Vercel dpl_7WHHzv7L6B3cp8u3tzRDqYKjcAgM. CI, Vercel, production HTTP smoke, browser smoke, and incident rehearsal passed, but strict PWA governance failed on poor-vitals rate 25.00% > 15.00%.

Candidate F burn-in follow-up on 2026-06-19 found the poor homepage sample aged out. Scheduled PWA Ramp Governance passed on 6ccde1e; manual normal governance warns only because the last 60 minutes had zero events, so rates are unavailable.

Candidate G adds a shared async fixed-window rate-limit backend with optional Upstash Redis REST enforcement, memory fallback, safe key normalization, and tests. Candidate G was initially deployed to production as commit 5736b21 / Vercel dpl_2ZHSbR5dzBJCYAeuF6Tjh2CggrgU.

Candidate H connected Vercel ku-online-dev to Upstash resource ku-bazar-rate-limit and proved production rate limiting is active through Vercel KV env names: rateLimit.configured=true, source=vercel-kv, backend=upstash, status=ok on the protected production health endpoint.

Candidate I executed Phase 5 Slice A Part 1: production npm audit high advisories were reduced from 4 to 0; final production audit has 6 total non-high advisories, and remaining high advisories are full-audit/dev-tooling paths primarily under the Vercel CLI transitive tree.

Candidate I required npm 10 lockfile normalization because GitHub Actions npm ci expected a nested optional @swc/helpers@0.5.23 entry. Follow-up commit 0b7c06f passed local npm 10 install validation, GitHub CI 27898130848, Vercel deployment dpl_WD1vgJdecGtQSdGqpEYzJdH1AzKA, production smoke, and protected health verification.

Candidate J found Cleanup expired listings run 27898184065 failed before querying or mutating listings because Supabase realtime initialization on Node 20 lacks native WebSocket support after the dependency upgrade. Maintenance workflows were aligned to Node 22 and commit 10ba092 passed GitHub CI 27898810418, Vercel deployment dpl_Aa8vqtoQjfxz82w5R2w7raN8u7h7, production smoke, and protected health verification.

Candidate K removed the repo-pinned Vercel CLI devDependency, kept Vercel CLI as external operator tooling, and added narrow transitive overrides so full npm audit has 0 high/critical advisories. Commit 8224378 passed GitHub CI 27919595935, Vercel deployment dpl_Hh7tiXrxJoMEzgkeccnXq83UnmWr, production smoke, and protected health verification.

Candidate L observed production maintenance workflows without dispatching mutation-capable jobs. Product translations and embeddings run 27936502407, Cleanup expired listings run 27942446708, and Algolia Synonyms run 27937125441 all passed on current main commit 0afff39.
Candidate M adds shared timing-safe admin-token handling, Bearer/x-admin-token support, non-persistent service-role options for token-admin routes, and removes revalidate token debug logging.

decisions.decision: Use phased PWA rollout with conservative cache strategy to avoid auth/session regressions.
Add dedicated agent-memory system (state + journal + updater script) before implementation work.

open_risks: Service worker caching can cause stale authenticated behavior if API routes are cached incorrectly.
Proxy matcher may interfere with service worker delivery if not explicitly excluded.
Local browser validation still shows 400s for two local Supabase product image resources on /; this appears tied to local storage/test data, not the Candidate E image asset changes.

Production read-only telemetry after Candidate E showed one / FCP poor sample at 3740ms and one / LCP needs-improvement sample at 3792ms with good TTFB. That sample aged out by 2026-06-19, but current RUM volume is too low to claim full homepage performance clearance.
Distributed rate limiting is now active through Vercel KV/Upstash, but the current provider resource is free tier with eviction enabled and should be revisited before broad public launch.
Shared ADMIN_REVALIDATE_TOKEN still exists for legacy admin/internal automation; Candidate M hardens comparison and Bearer support but does not replace token routes with per-user admin sessions.
Privileged admin and service-role server paths still need continued ownership-check, authorization-boundary, test, and audit-log hardening.
Supabase CLI currently warns that it does not expose `supabase mcp`; deploy MCP gate still passes because required Vercel checks are ready.
Manual dispatch requires explicit approval because cleanup/i18n/synonyms workflows can mutate production listings, storage, translations, embeddings, and Algolia indexes.

GitHub scheduled workflows are best-effort; observed product maintenance cadence was not a strict 30-minute interval, so production-critical maintenance may need freshness alerting or a scheduler with stronger delivery guarantees.
